name: Simon Rattle
abstract: Sir Simon Denis Rattle (born 19 January 1955) is a British conductor. He rose to international prominence during the 1980s and 1990s, while music director of the City of Birmingham Symphony Orchestra (1980–1998).

concerts.label: Berlin in Lights: Simon Bolivar Youth Orchestra of Venezuela
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

works.t: Symphony No. 10 in E Minor, Op. 93

about_quotes.speaker: Quincy Jones
about_quotes.evidence: Simon Rattle wanted me to do a tour with him... He calls me all the time.
about_quotes.doc_title: Quincy Jones — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
